1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Cast wizard spells using Intelligence. Spellbook holds known spells; prepare INT mod + Wizard level spells per long rest.

1.name: Arcane Recovery
1.description: Once per long rest after a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to half your Wizard level (rounded up), none higher than 5th level.

2.name: Arcane Tradition
2.description: Choose a subclass school: Abjuration, Conjuration, Divination, Enchantment, Evocation, Illusion, Necromancy, or Transmutation.

18.name: Spell Mastery
18.description: Choose a 1st- and 2nd-level spell from your spellbook. Cast each at its lowest level without expending a slot.

20.name: Signature Spells
20.description: Choose two 3rd-level spells from your spellbook as signature spells, always prepared and castable once each without a slot per short rest.
